healthy.ro: Planta arata sanatoasa! Continua cu ingrijirea regulata.
healthy.en: The plant looks healthy! Keep up the regular care.

Apple_scab.ro: Rapan - indeparteaza frunzele afectate si aplica fungicide cu cupru.
Apple_scab.en: Apple scab - remove affected leaves and apply copper-based fungicides.

Black_rot.ro: Putregaiul negru - taie si arunca fructele afectate, trateaza cu fungicide.
Black_rot.en: Black rot - cut off and discard affected fruit, treat with fungicides.

Cedar_apple_rust.ro: Rugina marului - tratament preventiv cu fungicide la inceputul primaverii.
Cedar_apple_rust.en: Cedar apple rust - apply preventive fungicide treatment in early spring.

Powdery_mildew.ro: Fainare - aeriseste mai bine zona si aplica fungicide cu sulf.
Powdery_mildew.en: Powdery mildew - improve air circulation and apply sulfur-based fungicides.

Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_spot.ro: Pata Cercospora - aplica fungicide si nu uda frunzele direct.
Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_spot.en: Gray leaf spot - apply fungicides and avoid wetting the leaves directly.

Common_rust_.ro: Rugina comuna - fungicide si pe viitor alege soiuri mai rezistente.
Common_rust_.en: Common rust - apply fungicides and choose more resistant varieties going forward.

Northern_Leaf_Blight.ro: Helminthosporium - aplica fungicide si schimba culturile periodic.
Northern_Leaf_Blight.en: Northern leaf blight - apply fungicides and rotate crops periodically.

Esca_(Black_Measles).ro: Esca vitei de vie - taie partile afectate si dezinfecteaza uneltele.
Esca_(Black_Measles).en: Esca (grapevine trunk disease) - cut out affected wood and disinfect your tools.

Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot).ro: Arsura foliara - aplica fungicide pe baza de cupru, elimina frunzele afectate.
Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot).en: Leaf blight - apply copper-based fungicides and remove affected leaves.

Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).ro: Huanglongbing - boala foarte grava! Contactati urgent un specialist.
Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).en: Huanglongbing (citrus greening) - very serious disease! Contact a specialist urgently.

Bacterial_spot.ro: Pata bacteriana - tratament cu bactericide pe baza de cupru.
Bacterial_spot.en: Bacterial spot - treat with copper-based bactericides.

Early_blight.ro: Alternaria - fungicide preventiv si curata frunzele cazute de jos.
Early_blight.en: Early blight - apply preventive fungicide and clear fallen leaves from the ground.

Late_blight.ro: Mana - foarte agresiva! Tratament urgent cu fungicide sistemice.
Late_blight.en: Late blight - very aggressive! Urgent treatment with systemic fungicides.

Leaf_Mold.ro: Mucegaiul frunzelor - reduceti umiditatea si imbunatatiti ventilatia.
Leaf_Mold.en: Leaf mold - reduce humidity and improve ventilation.

Septoria_leaf_spot.ro: Septorioza - fungicide si nu uda plantele de sus.
Septoria_leaf_spot.en: Septoria leaf spot - apply fungicides and avoid overhead watering.

Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider_mite.ro: Acarieni - tratati cu acaricide sau sapun insecticid diluat.
Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider_mite.en: Spider mites - treat with miticides or diluted insecticidal soap.

Target_Spot.ro: Pata tinta - fungicide si curatati resturile vegetale de la sol.
Target_Spot.en: Target spot - apply fungicides and clear plant debris from the ground.

Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.ro: Virus ingalbenire - combateti musculita alba cu insecticide.
Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.en: Yellow leaf curl virus - control the whitefly vector with insecticides.

Tomato_mosaic_virus.ro: Virus mozaic - nu exista tratament, scoateti plantele bolnave.
Tomato_mosaic_virus.en: Mosaic virus - no treatment available, remove infected plants.

Leaf_scorch.ro: Arsura frunzelor - udati mai regulat si mulciti solul.
Leaf_scorch.en: Leaf scorch - water more regularly and mulch the soil.

BrownRust.ro: Rugina bruna la grau - fungicide sistemice, monitorizare frecventa in perioadele umede.
BrownRust.en: Brown rust in wheat - systemic fungicides, monitor closely during humid periods.

Mildew.ro: Mana la grau - fungicide preventive, evitati irigarea excesiva de sus.
Mildew.en: Wheat mildew - preventive fungicides, avoid excessive overhead irrigation.

Septoria.ro: Septorioza la grau - fungicide si monitorizare in perioadele umede.
Septoria.en: Wheat septoria - fungicides and monitoring during humid periods.

YellowRust.ro: Rugina galbena la grau - foarte contagioasa, fungicide urgente si soiuri rezistente pe viitor.
YellowRust.en: Yellow rust in wheat - highly contagious, urgent fungicide treatment and resistant varieties going forward.

Downy_mildew.ro: Mana la floarea-soarelui - fungicide sistemice si rotatia culturilor.
Downy_mildew.en: Sunflower downy mildew - systemic fungicides and crop rotation.

Gray_mold.ro: Mucegai cenusiu - indepartati partile afectate si imbunatatiti ventilatia.
Gray_mold.en: Gray mold - remove affected parts and improve ventilation.

Leaf_scars.ro: Cicatrici pe frunze - de obicei fara tratament, verificati daca apar si alte simptome.
Leaf_scars.en: Leaf scars - usually no treatment needed, check for other symptoms.
